title: Introduction Episode
overview: This episode introduces the audience to the entire cast of characters and a little of the back story for the main characters. It's a basic overview of the Shuffle! story and universe.

title: Fuyou Kaede Chapter Part 1
overview: Kaede's story is explained from when she and Rin were kids to when they are in high school.

title: Shigure Asa Chapter Part 1
overview: Asa's story involving Rin is explained from how they first met to when Asa health starts deteriorating in high school. A bit of Asa's backstory with her mother Ama is touched upon as well.

title: Nerine Chapter Part 1
overview: Nerine's story is explained during the time that she got to know Rin up to the point where it seems that Sia and Rin are about to be wed.

title: Lisianthus Chapter Part 1
overview: Sia's story is explained from how she first met Rin as a child to the point where rumors start about them getting married soon.

title: Primula Chapter Part 1
overview: Primula's story is explained from how she first met Rin in the arcade to the point where Rin gave her a new cat doll. The time when the Rin and his friends went to the beach is briefly explained as well.

title: Fuyou Kaede Chapter Part 2
overview: The rest of Kaede's story is explained from the point where Rin started seeing more of Asa to after Rin decided to move out of Kaede's house.

title: Shigure Asa Chapter Part 2
overview: The rest of Asa's story is explained from the point when Rin and she have their first date to when Asa finally used her magic to save Rin's life.

title: Nerine Chapter Part 2
overview: The rest of Nerine's story is explained from the point when Primula was taken back to the demon world to when Nerine told him about Lycoris.

title: Lisianthus Chapter Part 2
overview: The rest of Sia's story is explained from the point when Kikyō and Rin go on a date to when Sia finally confesses her love to Rin, but Rin already likes Asa at this point.

title: Primula Chapter Part 2
overview: The rest of Primula's story is explained from the point when she returns to the human world healed to when Rin has already moved out of Kaede's house.

title: Extra Chapter
overview: Rin and everyone take a trip on a ship in the God's Realm, but before long Rin and Nerine go missing. Fearing something has happened to them, Kaede, Asa, Sia, and Mayumi try to search for them.
